verses.text: Hear my defence; I am a Jew, taught at the feet of Gamaliel. Common ground. He begins where his hearers can agree.
Hear my defence; I am a Jew, taught at the feet of Gamaliel. Common ground. He begins where his hearers can agree.
Hear my defence; I am a Jew, taught at the feet of Gamaliel. Common ground. He begins where his hearers can agree.
I persecuted this way unto the death, binding men and women. Honest past. He owns the very zeal that once drove him.
I persecuted this way unto the death, binding men and women. Honest past. He owns the very zeal that once drove him.
Near Damascus a light shone; 'Saul... why persecutest thou me? I am Jesus.' The turning point. The risen Christ met and changed him.
Near Damascus a light shone; 'Saul... why persecutest thou me? I am Jesus.' The turning point. The risen Christ met and changed him.
Near Damascus a light shone; 'Saul... why persecutest thou me? I am Jesus.' The turning point. The risen Christ met and changed him.
Blinded by the light, I was led to Damascus. Humbled. The proud persecutor is led by the hand.
Blinded by the light, I was led to Damascus. Humbled. The proud persecutor is led by the hand.
Blinded by the light, I was led to Damascus. Humbled. The proud persecutor is led by the hand.
Ananias, a devout man, said, 'Brother Saul, receive thy sight'; I looked up. A welcome word. The enemy is called brother.
Ananias, a devout man, said, 'Brother Saul, receive thy sight'; I looked up. A welcome word. The enemy is called brother.
The God of our fathers chose thee; 'arise, and be baptized, and wash away thy sins.' Cleansed and sent. His sins are washed and his mission begun.
The God of our fathers chose thee; 'arise, and be baptized, and wash away thy sins.' Cleansed and sent. His sins are washed and his mission begun.
The God of our fathers chose thee; 'arise, and be baptized, and wash away thy sins.' Cleansed and sent. His sins are washed and his mission begun.
In the temple, 'Depart: for I will send thee far hence unto the Gentiles.' The Gentile call. God appointed him apostle to the nations.
In the temple, 'Depart: for I will send thee far hence unto the Gentiles.' The Gentile call. God appointed him apostle to the nations.
In the temple, 'Depart: for I will send thee far hence unto the Gentiles.' The Gentile call. God appointed him apostle to the nations.

In the temple, 'Depart: for I will send thee far hence unto the Gentiles.' The Gentile call. God appointed him apostle to the nations.
At this word they cry, Away with such a fellow; the captain orders him scourged. Hatred flares. The mention of the Gentiles enrages them.
At this word they cry, Away with such a fellow; the captain orders him scourged. Hatred flares. The mention of the Gentiles enrages them.
At this word they cry, Away with such a fellow; the captain orders him scourged. Hatred flares. The mention of the Gentiles enrages them.
Is it lawful to scourge a Roman uncondemned? the centurion warns the captain. A claimed right. Paul uses his citizenship wisely.
Is it lawful to scourge a Roman uncondemned? the centurion warns the captain. A claimed right. Paul uses his citizenship wisely.
Art thou a Roman? Yea; the captain fears, having bound him. Protected. God's providence shields His servant by the law.
Art thou a Roman? Yea; the captain fears, having bound him. Protected. God's providence shields His servant by the law.
Art thou a Roman? Yea; the captain fears, having bound him. Protected. God's providence shields His servant by the law.
He looses him and brings him before the council. A fair hearing sought. The truth is to be examined openly.
